target.name: HIV-1 protease
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. Folded object would be one 99-residue protease monomer; the active enzyme is a homodimer and the bound inhibitor is not predicted.
target.omitted_context: Reference preview is 1HSG chain A only (the second chain and the indinavir inhibitor are stripped). The catalytic site forms between two chains, so a single-chain fold cannot show the working active site.
